raw.message: Star a capybara in this text-based roguelike RPG!

hook.summary: A 'this or that' game item choice presented over a video of people petting capybaras.
hook.visual_action: A man and woman sit on a bench petting two large capybaras.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Dragon's Armor or Revival Cape? Revival Cape.

scene_flow: Woman presents a 'this or that' choice between game items while petting capybaras.
Man selects his preferred items as game icons appear on screen.
Woman asks for the secret to his high-level gear.
Man reveals a promo code and directs the viewer to download the game.
on_screen_text: AND HOW DID YOU GET ALL THAT?
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy cute animals and simple RPG progression mechanics.
